name: Ham & Cheese Crisps
recipeIngredient: 1/4 cup Parmesan or Romano cheese, grated
6 oz thinly sliced fully cooked ham
recipeInstructions:
1. Let the folded pastry stand at room temperature for 20 minutes to thaw.
2. Line baking sheets with parchment paper or plain brown paper.
3. Stir together honey and mustard; set aside.
4. On a lightly floured surface, unfold one pastry sheet.
5. Spread with half of the honey mustard mixture.
6. Sprinkle with half of the cheese and top with half of the ham.
7. Starting at a long edge, roll the pastry jelly roll style to the center of the dough.
8. Repeat from the opposite edge, forming two rolls that meet in the center.
9. With a sharp knife, cut the pastry roll crosswise into 1/2-inch thick slices.
(If the roll is too soft to slice easily, chill for a few minutes.)
10. Arrange the slices 2 inches apart on the prepared baking sheets.
11. Repeat with the remaining pastry, honey mustard mixture, and ham.
(If desired, place the baking sheet in the freezer until pastries are solid.
Transfer frozen pastries to freezer containers or bags. Freeze for up to 1 month.)
12. Combine egg and water; brush onto pastries.
13. Bake fresh or frozen pastries in a 400°F oven for 15 to 18 minutes, or until golden.
14. Remove from the sheet and cool on a rack.
15. Serve warm or at room temperature.
Makes 40.
